arts.ttl: Man City injury, suspension news and return dates for Real Madrid: Nico Gonzalez, Ederson, Jeremy Doku latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Manchester City's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League playoff first leg against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold doesn’t share Steven Gerrard’s reason for turning down Real Madrid
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's recent links with Real Madrid have brought back memories of the time Los Blancos wanted Liverpool legend Steven Gerrard, whose mind was in a different place

arts.ttl: Ancelotti on VAR pen: 'Football people' confused
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti said "football people don't understand" penalties like the one awarded to Atlético Madrid in their 1-1 derby draw with Real Madrid on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 1 -1 Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Dani Ceballos—8: Madrid’s most effective player in progressing play via both carries and forward passes. Defensively was often caught out of position and was forced to foul Atleti players when trying to keep up in transition.

arts.ttl: Lucas Vázquez: “We didn’t get that little bit of luck to score the second goal”
arts.sum: After the break, the team came out really energised, then we got level and in the end, we had several chances to make it 2-1 but it didn't come.” The fans are part of the team and will help us win titles.”

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “We deserved more in the second half”
arts.sum: "In the second half, Vinicius and Rodrygo played wider and created many dangerous situations." The penalty affected the team in a first half that was slower and less aggressive compared to the second.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 1 - 1 Atletico Madrid, Post-game, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani discusss: The difference in Real Madrid ’s performance in the 1st half vs 2nd half, with special focus on Vinicius Jr, Rodrygo Goes, Jude Bellingham

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham's X-rated rant at linesman broadcast on live TV as Real Madrid star fumes
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham and his Real Madrid team-mates were left frustrated after a 1-1 draw with rivals Atletico, and the England star couldn't hide his emotions early in the first half

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti: “I don’t want to talk about the referee”
arts.sum: The team was good in the second half.” It was a very good game in the second half.

arts.ttl: One Real Madrid star completed 101/102 passes vs Atlético
arts.sum: One member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid managed to complete all but one of his passes during the club’s meeting with Atlético. The player in…
